title: philotheca trachyphylla
intro: Philotheca trachyphylla, also known as the lemon-scented bottlebrush, is a small shrub native to Australia. It is a member of the Rutaceae family and is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Philotheca trachyphylla include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve stress and anxiety, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
